stages.system_prompt: Complete this Python function. Write clean, correct code.
Complete this function. Handle edge cases: empty inputs, single elements, negative numbers, zero, boundary values.
Complete this function. Read the docstring examples very carefully. Make sure your code produces exactly those outputs.
Complete this function. First think about the algorithm, then implement. Use a straightforward iterative approach.
Complete this function. Use Python standard library (itertools, collections, math) where it simplifies the logic.
Complete this function. Add input validation. Be careful about off-by-one errors and type coercion.
Complete this function. Try a different, perhaps unusual but correct approach. Think outside the box.
Fix the bug. The error message tells you exactly what went wrong.
Previous approaches all failed. Try a completely different algorithm.
